name: Curach (Irish Honey-And-Oatmeal Cream)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the oatmeal on a cookie sheet under the broiler, or in a hot oven. Stir it from time to time and watch it carefully until it turns a pale golden color. Allow it to cool completely.
2. Whip the cream until it holds its shape. Stir in the honey and whiskey.
3. Add the cold toasted oatmeal to the whipped cream mixture.
4. Layer the raspberries and the cream mixture in glasses, saving a few berries for decoration on top. Serve slightly cool.
